description: Style NoteKeep cool on a sunny day and get that trendy look with this basics cap. Styled as a classic beret cap it will keep you looking effortlessly stylish on your day out.They come in a variety of designs that are sure to take your fancy and the material is light and breathableProduct DetailsBlue denim beretHas a trendy press button option between the visor and crownHas an elastic band along the crown for a snug FitHas a fabric inner liningMaterial and CareDenimMachine wash in cold water or hand wash separatelyDo not use softeners or bleachTumble dry on lowCool iron; Do not iron on designDo not dry cleanSize and FitFree size
